mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
